title: Immersive Nether
description: Makes Nether only survival more immersive.
body:
# Immersive Nether
Makes Nether only survival more immersive by changing wood into crimson and stone into blackstone.

![Nether Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d86c3df4592281b9981558c237ad8733bf0a4e3f.png)

![Nether Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fca93184ac4ace1bcca515a421367ffa07b5755e.png)

Texture Changes:
- Barrel
- Blast Furnace
- Brewing Stand
- Campfires
- Composter
- Crafting Table
- Furnace
- Grindstone
- Ladder
- Stonecutter
- Torches
- Armor Stand
- Chest
- Shield
- Arrows
- Bow
- Bowl
- Crossbow
- Swords
- Picks
- Axes
- Shovels
- Hoes
- Fishing Rod and Warped Fungus on a Stick
- Item Frames
- Mushroom Stew
- Stick

Read "About Pack.txt" for full list of changes.
